app.title: ContraCulture
app.description: Your translated landing page is losing you money. ContraCulture uses Hofstede cultural psychology to rewrite your copy for each market.
projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Culturally adapt your landing page copy for global markets
projects.emptyDesc: Create your first project to start culturally adapting your copy
results.title: A/B Simulation Results
how.step1.title: Analyze Persuasion
how.step1.desc: AI classifies your copy by persuasion pattern — individualist, collectivist, authority-based, and more.
how.step2.title: Cultural Adaptation
how.step2.desc: Using Hofstede dimensions, we rewrite your copy to match each target culture — not just translate the words.
how.step3.title: A/B Simulation
how.step3.desc: See predicted conversion rates for literal translation vs. culturally adapted copy in each market.
auth.loginDesc: Sign in to optimize your landing page copy for every culture
auth.signupDesc: Create an account to start culturally adapting your copy
